blocks.title: 📘 TO BE · I am, you are, he is
blocks.intro: Para dar datos personales usamos el verbo to be. Estudia con las tarjetas y practica con los juegos.

cells.body:
What's your name?
Where are you from?
What's your job?

I have 20 years
I'm 20 (years old)
edad con 'be', no 'have'

blocks.ladderLabel: Formas cortas — así se habla normalmente:
blocks.note: Cómo funciona: esta lección tiene tarjetas 🃏, imágenes 🖼️, un juego de memoria 🧠, escucha 🎧 y completar 📝. ✓ CHECK donde lo veas.

blocks.title: FLASHCARDS · trabajos
blocks.intro: Tocá cada tarjeta para ver la traducción. Estúdialas antes de los ejercicios.

blocks.title: UNÍ TRABAJO E IMAGEN
blocks.intro: Tocá la imagen y luego el trabajo correcto.

blocks.title: AUDIO 1 · NICE TO MEET YOU
blocks.desc: Ana y Tom hablan de su país, trabajo y edad.

speaking.prompt: Give your personal info: name, country, job and age.
speaking.starter: Hi, I'm… I'm from… I'm a… and I'm … years old.

transcript.html: Hi! I'm Ana. I'm from Mexico. I'm a student.
Nice to meet you, Ana. I'm Tom. I'm from Canada, and I'm an engineer.
An engineer? Cool! How old are you?
I'm twenty. Where do you work, Tom?
I work in a big company. What about you?
I'm a student. I study English at university.

blocks.title: MEMORY · países y banderas
blocks.intro: Encontrá cada país con su bandera. Tocá dos cartas.

blocks.title: AUDIO 2 · THIS IS MY FRIEND
blocks.desc: María presenta a su amigo Leo. Escucha su país, trabajo y edad.

speaking.prompt: Introduce a friend: name, country, job, age. Use He's / She's…
speaking.starter: This is my friend… He's from… He's a… and he's … years old.

transcript.html: Hello! This is my friend Leo. He's from Brazil. He's a doctor. He's thirty years old. He works in a hospital in São Paulo. He speaks Portuguese, English, and a little Spanish. He's very friendly!

blocks.title: ✍️ ABOUT ME
blocks.example: My name is Sofia. I'm from Argentina. I'm a student and I work in a café. I'm twenty years old. I speak Spanish and a little English. Nice to meet you!
blocks.hw: Escribe tu presentación y graba un audio diciéndola. Envíame ambos por WhatsApp.

lines: Hi! I'm Ana. I'm from Mexico. I'm a student.
Nice to meet you, Ana. I'm Tom. I'm from Canada, and I'm an engineer.
An engineer? Cool! How old are you?
I'm twenty. Where do you work, Tom?
I work in a big company. What about you?
I'm a student. I study English at university.
Hello! This is my friend Leo. He's from Brazil. He's a doctor. He's thirty years old. He works in a hospital in Sao Paulo. He speaks Portuguese, English, and a little Spanish. He's very friendly!
